nodes.name: build.gradle
nodes.summary: Root Gradle build script for the Android project defining buildscript repositories, SDK versions, and the React Native / Expo Gradle plugins.

nodes.name: gradle.properties
nodes.summary: Gradle project properties controlling JVM memory, AndroidX, Hermes/New Architecture flags, and other React Native build toggles.

nodes.name: gradlew.bat
nodes.summary: Windows batch wrapper script that bootstraps and launches the Gradle build for the Android project.

nodes.name: settings.gradle
nodes.summary: Gradle settings file registering the app module and applying Expo/React Native autolinking and plugin management.
